RAID LOG — Healthcare Integration, Clinic A Pilot
Prepared by: M. Okafor (PC) | Week of 2026-04-15

RISKS
R1 | Vendor API v2 deprecation 2026-07-10
    Trigger: Vendor EOL email 2026-03-28.
    Impact: High — patient lookup endpoint critical.
    Likelihood: High.
    Owner: J. Patel (Lead Eng, on leave). Backup: D. Huang.
    Mitigation: Schedule migration spike post-leave. Vendor PS option being
               scoped; SOW expected 2026-04-22.

R2 | Scope expansion ask (Clinics B + C before stabilization)
    Trigger: PO ask 2026-04-12.
    Impact: High.
    Likelihood: Medium.
    Owner: K. Bell (PO).
    Mitigation: Push back at 2026-04-19 steering with KPI data; propose
               deferral to 2026-07-01.

R3 | Engineer paternity leave coverage gap
    Impact: Medium. Likelihood: Certain.
    Owner: L. Davies (Eng Manager).
    Mitigation: D. Huang cross-trained; on-call active.

R4 | HL7 lab feed instability
    Impact: Medium. Likelihood: High.
    Owner: R. Silva.
    Mitigation: Auto-retry deployed; vendor diagnostic 2026-04-17.

ISSUES
I1 | 3 endpoints added mid-build, testing not planned
    Owner: M. Okafor (PC). Action: QA plan by 2026-04-22.

ASSUMPTIONS
A1 | Vendor PS team will deliver migration on the SOW timeline.
    Owner: J. Patel. Validation: weekly status.

DEPENDENCIES
D1 | Vendor migration support (linked R1).
    Owner: T. Reyes (Vendor PM).

D2 | Internal IT cutover support.
    Owner: R. Silva.

(Document version: v1. Will update for next steering after 2026-04-19.)
